summary: Grid trading bot on Internet Computer Protocol (ICP) using the ICP/ckBTC pair on ICDex. Bot canister: xeccu-3iaaa-aaaai-at4kq-cai. ICDex canister for ckBTC/ICP pair: 5u2c6-kyaaa-aaaar-qadiq-cai. Currently on version 46. Working on depositing ICP and ckBTC into the bot, and verifying dashboard shows ckBTC balance and ICDex errors in Activity Log.
architectural_notes: ckBTC uses ICRC-1; must be sent to correct ICDex subaccount via getDepositAccount, not directly to bot principal
ICP can be sent directly to bot principal: xeccu-3iaaa-aaaai-at4kq-cai
ICDex Unit Size: 0.00001 ckBTC; Taker fee: 0.3%, Maker fee: 0%
known_issues: Repeated build failures (budget_exceeded) when attempting to add depositCkBTC backend function — builds consistently fail
Repeated budget_exceeded/AI implementation errors when attempting to add getDepositAccount/depositCkBTC — chat context size may be contributing to build failures

new_feature_requests.summary: Add depositCkBTC function in Motoko backend: calls getDepositAccount on ICDex and transfers ckBTC from bot canister to the correct subaccount
Add deposit button on dashboard to trigger depositCkBTC function automatically

Audit backend/main.mo for unused variables, dead code, redundant imports, unreachable branches, and stale comments. Remove or clean up anything that is no longer needed without changing observable behaviour.
Audit backend/migration.mo for relevance. If it only resets lastMidPrice and that field no longer exists or the reset is no longer necessary, simplify or remove the file accordingly.

Audit all frontend source files (excluding immutable paths) for unused imports, unused state variables, dead components, duplicate logic, and inconsistent naming conventions. Remove or reconcile anything that is not referenced or is contradictory.

Add a public query/update function `getDepositAddr` to the backend actor in `backend/main.mo` that performs an inter-canister call to `getDepositAccount` on canister `5u2c6-kyaaa-aaaar-qadiq-cai`, passing the bot canister's own principal as the argument, and returns the result. Do not change any other existing logic.
